chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1314 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.07.2025 For orders on MA 5268/25 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 5269/25 For orders on MA 5270/25 For hearing of main case Mr. Ali Nawaz Chandio, Advocate for Petitioner 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions 4&5. The grievance of the Petitioner is that an FIR has been registered against him which is pending investigation over a protracted period without the final challan being presented. He seeks that the same be quashed and that the respondents be restrained not to make any arrest or harass him in that regard. Having considered the matter, we are of the view that the Petition is misconceived as there are alternate remedies available to the Petitioner, whether by way of a bail application if he apprehends arrest and / or an application before the concerned Justice of Peace under Section 22-A & B Cr.P.C. on the score of harassment. The Petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
